name: The Restricted Stacks
description: Heln, the Spur Tower archivist, says the section you need has been sealed for forty years. The key component — a calibrated lodestone — was taken by a retired colleague now living in Thornbend. Retrieve it and the archives open.
accept_text: Heln runs her finger down a ledger. 'The section you need. Yes. Restricted access, sealed forty years. I submitted your request upstairs and received approval this morning.' She taps a note on her desk — neat handwriting, no signature. 'But the resonance lock requires a calibrated lodestone that isn't here anymore. Tessaly Venn — she used to work this desk — took it when she retired to Thornbend. Vineyard settlement, half a day south. She's... friendly. Bring it back and I'll open the stacks.'
progress_text: Heln glances up. 'Tessaly. Thornbend. Half a day south. The lodestone is probably holding down her grape receipts.'
complete_text: Heln takes the lodestone and sets it into a small depression in the archive door frame. Something clicks — a resonance you feel through your Kin-sense, a frequency settling into place. The door unseals. 'There. The restricted stacks are yours. Please reshelve what you pull. The person upstairs notices.'

objectives.description: Speak with Heln at the Spur Tower archives about restricted access
Travel to the vineyard settlement at Thornbend
Find Tessaly Venn and ask about the lodestone
Tessaly is in the vineyards until evening — find somewhere to wait
Retrieve the calibrated lodestone from Tessaly
Return the lodestone to Heln at Spur Tower
